en: To love oneself is the beginning of a lifelong romance.
zh: 爱自己是一生浪漫的开始。

en: If a person remains steadfast enough, they can make their dreams come true.
zh: 如果一个人一直足够坚定，就能实现他的愿望。

en: My attention has always been drawn inward, where I continue to discover myself.
zh: 我始终沉浸在自己之中，我的注意力永远朝向内心。

en: Reading, suffering, and loving the joy that grows from suffering—this is a journey without end.
zh: 读书，痛苦，爱着从痛苦中滋生出来的那份喜悦，这是一个永无止境的过程。

en: Every person I meet and every scent that drifts through the streets gives me another reason to love this world.
zh: 我遇见的每一个人，街头的每一丝气味，都让我有了无限去爱的理由。
